events.name: Green Bay Packers at Detroit Lions

headlines.description: — Jordan Love dropped back and threw deep on his first snap, taking advantage of what the Green Bay Packers thought the Detroit Lions defense would give them.
headlines.shortLinkText: Love ties career high with 3 TD passes, leads Packers to 29-22 win over NFC North-leading Lions

headlines.description: — Dak Prescott and his right guard, Zack Martin, feasted on a turkey leg together on the sideline with six minutes left in the game after the star quarterback's fourth touchdown pass.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bland, Prescott help Cowboys to 13th straight home win with 45-10 victory over Commanders

headlines.description: — After running for two touchdowns and helping San Francisco beat the rival Seahawks for a fourth straight time, Christian McCaffrey was going to enjoy his celebratory meal.
headlines.shortLinkText: Christian McCaffrey's big first half carries NFC West-leading 49ers to 31-13 victory over Seahawks
